HGSS.451.0000:
Hello, welcome to our Training Hall.\f
You may battle our best Trainers and
their favorite Pokémon once\r
per day.\f
Would you like to participate? [0200,0000]
HGSS.451.0002:
You are ready!
Please go right through.\f
HGSS.451.0003:
I see...
Please come back again.\f
HGSS.451.0007:
Oh, hello!
Right this way, please!\f
HGSS.451.0008:
This is the Trainer House--
the place for Trainers.\f
The Pokéwalker will bring your
friends here!\f
You can challenge various Trainers
once a day.\f
You’ll earn Battle Points when you win.\r
Bring out your best!\f
HGSS.451.0009:
Oh! I’ll borrow your Vs. Recorder
for a moment.\f
Let’s see... Slide open this part here,
and ticka-tacka-kachunk there!\f
All done!\f
Now you can check your Battle Points
using your Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.451.0011:
You may exchange your Battle Points
for fabulous prizes at Johto\r
Battle Frontier!\f
HGSS.451.0012:
Now that you are ready,
would you like to train yourself? [0200,0000]
